description: Composition Dark grey scooped neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck, and chest print with sequins and thread detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Are you that girl who rocks a guy's world with her starry eyes and swaying moves? Get called the queen of style in this feminine t-shirt from lee. Pair it with a short skirt or slim Fit denims along with slip-on shoes for ultimate cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
